summary: Comprehensive testing of FacturePro billing application - Backend 100% pass (40/40 tests), Frontend UI fully functional with minor issues

ui_bugs.issue: Export page is a placeholder without actual export buttons - CSV export API exists but no UI to trigger it

issues: Shows 'Impossible de charger l'image à cette URL' error for logo preview when URL is invalid

action_items: Add export buttons to ExportPage component to trigger /api/export/invoices/csv and /api/export/expenses/csv endpoints
critical_code_review_comments: App.js is a monolithic 3000+ line file - consider splitting into separate component files for maintainability
ExportPage component is incomplete - only shows placeholder text without actual export functionality

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all navigation, CRUD, auth flows work; export page incomplete)

seed_data_creation: Backend seeds gussdub@gmail.com account on startup with sample client and product
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs tested and working. Frontend navigation, login, registration, forgot password, client CRUD, invoice creation with tax calculation (QC/ON), quotes, employees, expenses, settings all work. Export page needs UI buttons to trigger CSV downloads.

frontend.login: PASS - Login form works, redirects to dashboard
frontend.registration: PASS - Registration form visible with company name field
frontend.forgot_password: PASS - Modal opens, generates reset code
frontend.dashboard: PASS - Shows stats cards (clients, invoices, quotes, revenue)
frontend.navigation: PASS - All sidebar links work (9 pages)
frontend.clients_crud: PASS - Create, list, edit, delete clients
frontend.invoices: PASS - Invoice form with province/tax selector
frontend.settings: PASS - Company settings form with tax numbers
frontend.exports: PARTIAL - Page loads but no export buttons
frontend.logout: PASS - Logout returns to login page

tax_calculation_verified.quebec: GST 5% + PST 9.975% - Verified in backend test
